name: Chicken Diable
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and pat it dry. Remove the skin if desired.
2. Melt the butter in a shallow baking pan, stirring in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Roll the chicken pieces in the butter mixture to coat both sides evenly.
4. Arrange the coated chicken in a single layer in the same pan, with the meaty side up.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 1 hour, or until the chicken is tender and glazed with a rich flavor.
This dish pairs well with rice. The pan juices can be served separately in a gravy cup to add extra flavor to the chicken and/or rice.
